problemRecovery.title: Recover The Reward Budget
problemRecovery.recoveredProblem: The case is not mainly about healthier snack reformulation. The load-bearing problem is that GLP-1 drugs dim the reward system behind impulse eating occasions, so the whole household reward budget can shrink across categories.
problemRecovery.hiddenConstraint: The unit of demand destruction is not the patient meal; it is the buyer's shared impulse-and-compulsion budget.
problemRecovery.falsifier: If impulse occasions and adjacent reward categories remain flat in GLP-1 households after adoption, the reward-budget thesis weakens.

candidates.title: Reward Budget Ledger
candidates.summary: Track GLP-1 households as one shrinking reward budget across snacks, alcohol, nicotine, cannabis, and impulse retail.
candidates.mechanism: Build a panel that follows treated households before and after adoption, measuring category-level impulse spend rather than protein-SKU substitution.
candidates.claimedDelta: Moves the thesis from a food preference trend to a cross-category demand-regime change.

candidates.title: Food Noise Tripwire
candidates.summary: Use the disappearance of grazing and checkout add-ons as the first observable warning signal.
candidates.mechanism: Compare basket add-ons, convenience trips, and salty/sweet repeat purchases for treated versus untreated households.
candidates.claimedDelta: Finds the break before CPG earnings call language catches up.

candidates.title: GLP-1 Friendly Trap
candidates.summary: Treat protein-and-fiber launches as a consensus decoy that preserves SKU thinking while occasions disappear.
candidates.mechanism: Score brands by dependence on occasion volume versus ability to sell into planned meals.
candidates.claimedDelta: Separates winners that can survive fewer occasions from brands merely relabeling old demand.

critics.pressure: Strong because it follows the neurological mechanism into observable household baskets.
critics.revisionMandate: Define the treated-household cohort and the impulse categories included.

critics.pressure: Distinct from the common reformulation thesis and captures the cross-category knock-on.
critics.revisionMandate: Keep the reward-budget frame sharper than a generic health trend.

critics.pressure: Mechanism is clear: food-noise reduction compresses discretionary reward occasions.
critics.revisionMandate: State which category should move first if the mechanism is true.

critics.pressure: Observable basket behavior is practical and early.
critics.revisionMandate: Separate fewer trips from smaller baskets inside the metric.

critics.pressure: Useful signal layer, but narrower than the reward-budget ledger.
critics.revisionMandate: Tie the tripwire to adjacent categories, not only snacks.

critics.pressure: Mechanism is credible but could collapse into ordinary basket analytics.
critics.revisionMandate: Name the exact impulse moments expected to disappear first.

critics.pressure: The decoy framing is plausible but depends on comparing launches against occasion loss.
critics.revisionMandate: Add a falsifiable threshold for when reformulation fails.

critics.pressure: Good critique of the consensus but less complete as an investable thesis.
critics.revisionMandate: Fuse it with a positive measurement system.

critics.pressure: It explains what not to do more than what changes in the market.
critics.revisionMandate: Convert the trap into a concrete sorting rule.
